form.label: SDA TLS Decryption — Selective Decrypt / Bypass (C8 + C16)
form.description: FTDv TLS-inspection outcomes on the SDA-Decrypt policy (index=network, %FTD-6-430003 connection-end events): sessions decrypted via Decrypt-Resign (C8, Decrypt-CAMPUS-443) vs bypassed via Do Not Decrypt (C16-DND-ISE), server-cert trust, TLS versions, undecryptable-flow status, and Encrypted Visibility Engine (C14) insight into the bypassed sessions. SD-Access ISE Integration lab.

search.query: index=network "SSLActualAction: Do Not Decrypt" | stats count
index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<action>[^,]+)" | stats count by action
index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<action>[^,]+)" | timechart span=15m count by action

panel.title: Decision path — SSL policy → rule → action

search.query: index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<action>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLRuleName: (?<rule>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLPolicy: (?<policy>[^,]+)" | rex "DstIP: (?<dst>[^,]+)" | stats count as sessions by policy rule action dst | sort -sessions
index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLServerCertStatus: (?<certstatus>[^,]+)" | stats count by certstatus
index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLVersion: (?<ver>[^,]+)" | stats count by ver | sort -count
index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLFlowStatus: (?<flow>[^,]+)" | stats count by flow

panel.title: TLS inspection detail — session by session

search.query: index=network "SSLActualAction" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<action>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLRuleName: (?<rule>[^,]+)" | rex "DstIP: (?<dst>[^,]+)" | rex "URL: (?<url>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLServerCertStatus: (?<certstatus>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLVersion: (?<ver>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLCipherSuite: (?<cipher>[^,]+)" | rex "User: (?<user>[^,]+)" | eval url=coalesce(url,"-") | table _time action rule dst url certstatus ver cipher user | sort -_time

panel.title: Encrypted Visibility Engine (C14) — app insight without decryption · bypassed sessions

search.query: index=network "EVE_Process" | rex "EVE_Process: (?<eve_process>[^,]+)" | rex "EVE_ProcessConfidencePct: (?<proc_conf>\d+)" | rex "EVE_ThreatConfidencePct: (?<threat_conf>\d+)" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<action>[^,]+)" | stats count as sessions, avg(proc_conf) as avg_proc_confidence, max(threat_conf) as max_threat_confidence by eve_process action | eval avg_proc_confidence=round(avg_proc_confidence,0) | sort -sessions
